title: Track remaining coding-ritual setup (claude-rc install/verify)
description: Placeholder to verify cr- prefix after beads reinit. Real remaining work: install+verify claude-rc systemd sessions from an interactive WSL shell; verify the 4 project paths.
notes: Scripts renamed (2026-06-25): claude-rc.sh→remote-control.sh, setup-claude-rc.sh→setup-remote-control.sh. Now also manages Codex: single global daemon via systemd codex-rc.service, Type=simple ExecStart 'cd $HOME && exec codex remote-control' (bare cmd = foreground; verified EXIT=124, no leftover), Restart=always. Codex needs no pairing URL — pick machine 'MVPBeast' in Codex app. INSTALL from interactive WSL: /data/codes/coding-ritual/scripts/setup-remote-control.sh ; then './remote-control.sh status' and './remote-control.sh pair <claude-name>'. Claude internals still named claude-rc@<project> (per-project); ~/.config/claude-rc/*.env unchanged.
